Yellow Rust.simple_desc_en: A fungal disease that forms yellow stripes on leaves, severely affecting crop yield.
Yellow Rust.symptoms_en: Yellow pustules arranged in parallel lines on the upper surface of leaves.
Yellow Rust.organic_remedy_en: Grow rust-resistant varieties. Use bio-fungicides like Trichoderma viride.
Yellow Rust.chemical_remedy_en: Spray Propiconazole or Tebuconazole at the early appearance of symptoms.

Aphids.simple_desc_en: Small sap-sucking insects that stunt plant growth.
Aphids.symptoms_en: Yellowing of leaves, sticky honeydew on plants, and black sooty mold.
Aphids.organic_remedy_en: Release ladybird beetles (natural predators). Spray 5% Neem Seed Kernel Extract.

Stem Borer.simple_desc_en: A destructive pest where larvae feed inside the stem.
Stem Borer.symptoms_en: Deadheart (drying of the central shoot) in vegetative stage and whiteheads (empty panicles) in reproductive stage.
Stem Borer.organic_remedy_en: Use trichogramma egg parasitoids. Apply Neem oil.
Stem Borer.chemical_remedy_en: Apply Cartap Hydrochloride 4G granules in standing water.

Blast Disease.simple_desc_en: A severe fungal disease affecting leaves, nodes, and panicles.
Blast Disease.symptoms_en: Spindle-shaped spots with grey centers and dark brown margins.
Blast Disease.organic_remedy_en: Avoid excessive nitrogen fertilizers. Spray Pseudomonas fluorescens.

Pink Bollworm.simple_desc_en: Caterpillars that bore into cotton bolls, destroying the lint.
Pink Bollworm.symptoms_en: Rosette flowers, exit holes on bolls, and rotting of developing bolls.
Pink Bollworm.organic_remedy_en: Install pheromone traps (5/acre). Pluck and destroy rosette flowers early.
Pink Bollworm.chemical_remedy_en: Spray Spinosad 45 SC or Emamectin Benzoate.

Whitefly.simple_desc_en: Tiny white insects that suck sap and transmit viral diseases.
Whitefly.symptoms_en: Downward curling of leaves, sticky honeydew, and stunted growth.
Whitefly.organic_remedy_en: Use yellow sticky traps (10/acre). Spray neem oil (10,000 ppm).

Fall Armyworm.simple_desc_en: Aggressive caterpillars that devour maize leaves and whorls.
Fall Armyworm.symptoms_en: Window-pane like feeding marks on leaves; large amounts of sawdust-like excreta in the whorl.
Fall Armyworm.organic_remedy_en: Apply dry sand or ash in the plant whorls. Spray Metarhizium anisopliae.
Fall Armyworm.chemical_remedy_en: Spray Spinetoram 11.7 SC or Chlorantraniliprole 18.5 SC.

Girdle Beetle.simple_desc_en: A beetle that girdles the stem, causing the upper plant to die.
Girdle Beetle.symptoms_en: Two parallel circular cuts on the stem or petiole. The plant part above the cut dries up.
Girdle Beetle.organic_remedy_en: Collect and destroy infested plant parts. Deep summer ploughing.

Alternaria Blight.simple_desc_en: A fungal infection thriving in humid conditions.
Alternaria Blight.symptoms_en: Small light brown round spots on lower leaves forming concentric rings (target board effect).
Alternaria Blight.organic_remedy_en: Use treated, certified seeds. Maintain proper spacing for aeration.
Alternaria Blight.chemical_remedy_en: Spray Mancozeb 75 WP at 15 days interval.

Red Rot.simple_desc_en: Often called the 'cancer of sugarcane', it destroys the cane from inside.
Red Rot.symptoms_en: Yellowing of top leaves. Splitting the cane reveals red tissues with white crossbands and an alcoholic smell.
Red Rot.organic_remedy_en: Uproot and burn infected clumps. Crop rotation with rice.
Red Rot.chemical_remedy_en: Treat setts with Carbendazim before planting. No direct chemical cure once infected.

Late Blight.simple_desc_en: The devastating disease that caused the Irish Potato Famine.
Late Blight.symptoms_en: Water-soaked irregular pale green spots on leaves that turn brown and rot in moist weather.
Late Blight.organic_remedy_en: Plant resistant varieties. Ensure good soil drainage.
Late Blight.chemical_remedy_en: Preventive spray of Mancozeb. Curative spray of Metalaxyl.

Fruit Borer.simple_desc_en: Caterpillars that bore into the fruits, rendering them unmarketable.
Fruit Borer.symptoms_en: Circular holes on fruits. Half of the caterpillar body is often seen outside the fruit.
Fruit Borer.organic_remedy_en: Plant African Marigold as a trap crop. Spray Neem oil.

Leaf Curl Virus.simple_desc_en: A viral disease transmitted by Whiteflies.
Leaf Curl Virus.symptoms_en: Severe curling, crinkling, and puckering of leaves. Plant becomes bushy.
Leaf Curl Virus.organic_remedy_en: Uproot infected plants immediately. Manage whiteflies using yellow sticky traps.
Leaf Curl Virus.chemical_remedy_en: Control whitefly vectors using Imidacloprid. No direct chemical cure for the virus.

Thrips.simple_desc_en: Microscopic insects that scrape the leaves and suck the sap.
Thrips.symptoms_en: Silvery white patches on leaves. Leaves bend, dry, and wither from the tip downwards.
Thrips.organic_remedy_en: Use blue sticky traps. Spray Beauveria bassiana.

Tikka Disease (Leaf Spot).simple_desc_en: A common fungal disease causing defoliation.
Tikka Disease (Leaf Spot).symptoms_en: Dark brown, circular spots on leaves surrounded by a yellow halo.
Tikka Disease (Leaf Spot).organic_remedy_en: Crop rotation. Spray botanical extracts like NSKE.

Mango Hopper.simple_desc_en: The most damaging pest during the flowering season.
Mango Hopper.symptoms_en: Nymphs and adults suck sap from inflorescence, causing flowers to dry and drop. Sooty mold develops on honeydew.
Mango Hopper.organic_remedy_en: Prune overcrowded branches to allow sunlight. Spray Neem oil.
Mango Hopper.chemical_remedy_en: Spray Thiamethoxam or Buprofezin before flower opening.

Panama Wilt.symptoms_en: Yellowing starts from older leaves. The pseudo-stem splits, and the plant collapses.
Panama Wilt.organic_remedy_en: Dip suckers in Trichoderma viride paste before planting. Avoid waterlogging.
Panama Wilt.chemical_remedy_en: Soil drenching with Carbendazim. Eradicate infected plants.

Apple Scab.simple_desc_en: A fungal disease affecting both leaves and fruits.
Apple Scab.symptoms_en: Olive-green to black velvety spots on leaves and corky, scabby lesions on fruits.
Apple Scab.organic_remedy_en: Collect and burn fallen leaves in winter to destroy fungal spores.
Apple Scab.chemical_remedy_en: Spray Captan or Dodine during bud break and petal fall.

Mealybug.simple_desc_en: White cottony bugs that cluster on stems and fruits.
Mealybug.symptoms_en: White waxy masses on the plant. Leaves turn yellow, and fruit development halts.
Mealybug.organic_remedy_en: Release Acerophagus papayae (parasitoid wasp). Wash off bugs with a strong water jet.
Mealybug.chemical_remedy_en: Spray Profenofos. Add detergent/shampoo so the chemical sticks to their waxy coating.

Diamondback Moth.simple_desc_en: A major pest worldwide for cruciferous vegetables.
Diamondback Moth.symptoms_en: Larvae scrape the leaf tissues, leaving thin papery windows. Later, they make holes in the leaves.
Diamondback Moth.organic_remedy_en: Plant mustard as a trap crop. Use Bt (Bacillus thuringiensis) sprays.

Shoot and Fruit Borer.simple_desc_en: The most serious pest of brinjal.
Shoot and Fruit Borer.symptoms_en: Drooping of terminal shoots. Holes on fruits plugged with excreta.
Shoot and Fruit Borer.organic_remedy_en: Clip and destroy drooping shoots weekly. Install pheromone traps.

Yellow Vein Mosaic Virus.simple_desc_en: A devastating viral disease spread by whiteflies.
Yellow Vein Mosaic Virus.symptoms_en: A complex network of yellow veins. Fruits become small, yellowish, and tough.
Yellow Vein Mosaic Virus.organic_remedy_en: Use resistant seeds. Uproot infected plants immediately.
Yellow Vein Mosaic Virus.chemical_remedy_en: Control the whitefly vector using Acetamiprid or Imidacloprid.

Fruit Rot (Anthracnose).simple_desc_en: A fungal disease that rots the chillies before harvest.
Fruit Rot (Anthracnose).symptoms_en: Sunken circular dark spots on ripe fruits. High humidity speeds up the rot.
Fruit Rot (Anthracnose).organic_remedy_en: Use disease-free seeds. Avoid overhead irrigation.

Gram Pod Borer.simple_desc_en: The most destructive pest that eats the seeds inside the pods.
Gram Pod Borer.symptoms_en: Larva feeds with its head inside the pod and body outside. Round holes on pods.
Gram Pod Borer.organic_remedy_en: Install bird perches (T-shaped sticks) in the field. Spray NPV (Nuclear Polyhedrosis Virus).
